heading: Exemption from numbering requirements
label: 12303 Exemption from numbering requirements
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1230346:1468Section 12303 permits the Secretary and any State, when it is the issuing authority, to exempt vessels from the numbering requirements.

children.label: a
children.text: When the Secretary is the authority issuing a number under this chapter, the Secretary may exempt a vessel or class of vessels from the numbering requirements of this chapter under conditions the Secretary may prescribe.

children.label: b
children.text: When a State is the issuing authority, it may exempt from the numbering requirements of this chapter a vessel or class of vessels exempted under subsection (a) of this section or otherwise as permitted by the Secretary.
